ns1:revision.ns1:comment: Created page with "== Attendance == * Microsoft: Ellis Wilson, Cyrus Ramavarapu * Iowa State University: Shane Nehring * Oak Ridge National Lab: Rick Mohr * Humboldt University of Berlin: Detlev Conrad Mielczarek * Whamcloud: Andreas Dilger == Minutes == Status update provided on previously assigned tasks: * Ellis: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-542 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Tuning Pages] - No progress. Sent Peter email about getting WC account for Anthony, opened bug from..."
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Attendance ==
* Microsoft: Ellis Wilson, Cyrus Ramavarapu * Iowa State University: Shane Nehring * Oak Ridge National Lab: Rick Mohr * Humboldt University of Berlin: Detlev Conrad Mielczarek * Whamcloud: Andreas Dilger
== Minutes ==
Status update provided on previously assigned tasks:
* Ellis: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-542 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Tuning Pages] - No progress. Sent Peter email about getting WC account for Anthony, opened bug from Andreas Dilger/Mike Aguilar to port Protocol docs to Wiki. * Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - No progress. * Shane: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-540 Lustre Wiki: Review ZFS Feature Pages] - No progress; still working on ZFS docs. * Andreas: Discussed build steps with Detlev. Should remove super old distros, and eliminate some of the in-the-weeds stuff. Maybe segment client from server builds since the former is so simple comparatively. We should migrate all build docs to Lustre.org. * Detlev: Whamcloud JIRA needed -- email Peter. Discussed build pages again -- need to create a bug here in WC for him to tackle this. * Rick: LUG page link and Lustre 101 ORNL link validation -- No progress, positional change requiring a lot of time so probably need to pause for a month.
[[Category:DWG]]
